seo.title: Care Staffing Agency London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: London's trusted care staffing agency — qualified, vetted Healthcare Assistants, Support Workers, and Cleaners for care homes and supported living. Fast response, CQC-compliant.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Care Staffing Agency London
fields.sub: Whether it's temporary staffing solutions for health and care , permanent placements, or urgent last-minute cover, our team ensures that every shift is filled with qualified, vetted professionals who are ready to make a difference.

fields.heading: Care Staffing Agency London PSL Partnership
fields.body: we don't just provide care staff—we help your service run better. When you add us to your PSL, you get priority access to qualified staff plus free weekly planning tools built for inspections, team wellbeing, and smoother handovers. No other agency offers this kind of workforce support at no extra cost .

items.q: How quickly can your Care Staffing Agency in London provide staff in my borough?
items.a: Our Care Staffing Agency in London specialises in rapid response. In most cases, we can deploy qualified care staff within just a few hours, supported by our borough-specific availability lists and 24/7 on-call team.

items.q: Does your Care Staffing Agency in London cover live-in care arrangements?
items.a: Yes. We provide trained and compassionate live-in carers for both short-term and long-term placements. Our Care Staffing Agency in London ensures every live-in care arrangement is tailored to your client's individual needs.

items.q: Can your Care Staffing Agency in London supply emergency cover for night shifts?
items.a: Yes. We maintain a dedicated night shift team, enabling our Care Staffing Agency in London to provide emergency care cover at short notice — ensuring residents and service users are never left without support.

items.q: Why should I choose your Care Staffing Agency in London over others?
items.a: Our Care Staffing Agency in London combines speed, compliance, and compassion. Unlike general agencies, we focus exclusively on healthcare staffing, ensuring you always receive qualified professionals who meet CQC standards and align with your service values.

items.q: How does your Care Staffing Agency in London ensure continuity of care?
items.a: We understand the importance of consistency for service users. Many providers request the same staff repeatedly, and our Care Staffing Agency in London accommodates this to ensure familiar, trusted faces deliver ongoing care.

items.q: What types of roles can your Care Staffing Agency in London provide?
items.a: Our Care Staffing Agency in London supplies a full range of roles, including healthcare assistants (HCAs), support workers, live-in carers, night shift staff, and specialist care professionals. This flexibility allows us to meet the unique needs of every provider.

fields.body: From care homes to NHS facilities, supported living to private clients, we deliver temporary healthcare staff , agency care workers , and specialist support staff with speed and precision. Care Staffing Agency London PSL Partnership At Vigil Care Staffing , we don’t just provide care staff—we help your service run better.

We’ve created real-time templates for supervision, buddying, safeguarding, and onboarding—so your team stays ready, and your records do the talking. Add Vigil to Your PSL Learn more Subscribe to our Weekly Newsletter Our free workforce tools help you manage care staffing effectively. Add Vigil to Your PSL Partnering with Vigil means reliable staffing solutions tailored to your needs. Get dedicated support from experienced professionals.

Get Started Explore Toolkit Discover our range of workforce management tools designed to assist you in optimizing your staffing processes. View Tools Service Overview Learn about our staffing services, including emergency shift cover and ongoing workforce support tailored to your organization's requirements. More Info Get in Touch Reach out for personalised staffing solutions. Our team is here to provide support whenever you need it.

Contact Us Get Started with Our Partner Toolkit Our PSL partner toolkit includes essential resources to support your work. Explore tools like: Safeguarding Readiness Checklist Buddying & Induction Logs Supervision Templates Onboarding Audit Sheets Workforce Planning Dashboards These resources are designed to streamline processes and enhance effectiveness. Download Week 1 Checklist Join Our PSL Partnership Are you ready to elevate your care service? At Vigil Care Staffing, we welcome you to join our PSL partnership.

Gain access to top-notch staffing tools, dedicated support, and a flow of qualified professionals tailored to your needs. Tailored Workforce Solutions Access a workforce that meets your specific needs, ensuring that you have the right staff in place when you need them. Ongoing Support Our team provides continuous support to help you navigate staffing challenges, ensuring you’re never alone. Quality Assurance We prioritise quality in our staffing solutions, helping to elevate patient care standards across the board.
Benefits of Working with Vigil Care Staffing Agency London Working with us is more than filling a shift — it’s about safeguarding your service.

What our partners say Here’s how we’ve made a difference “Vigil Care Staffing provided exceptional support during our staffing crisis. Their quick response and professionalism made all the difference in maintaining our services. ” Sarah Johnson, Care Manager Newham, London What our partners say Rapid Cover in Islington In December, a supported living provider in Islington faced unexpected staff sickness during a critical week. Within 2 hours, we supplied two trained HCAs with previous experience in learning disability support.

The provider reported zero service disruption and praised the staff’s adaptability to residents’ complex needs. Islington, North London Our Vetting Process Step 1: Background Checks We conduct thorough background checks to ensure safety and reliability. Step 2: Right-to-Work Verification of each candidate's right to work in the UK. Step 3: Reference Checks We contact references to confirm their experience and skills.

Step 4: Competency Assessments We assess competencies to ensure they're fit for our roles. Why Choose Vigil Care Staffing in London? At Vigil Care Staffing, we’re more than just a service provider; we’re your partners in delivering outstanding care. With our deep industry knowledge, extensive resources, and focus on quality, we make sure your facility is prepared for the ever-evolving healthcare needs.

Here’s how we stand out: Dedicated Support You’ll have direct access to a dedicated account manager who knows your needs and is always ready to help. Compliance Help Strategic resources aligned to CQC Single Assessment Framework Custom Staffing Pre-vetted staff matched to your ethos , Your Trusted Care Staffing Partner Exceptional Care Staffing Solutions in London Supported Living We provide compassionate support for individuals living with diverse needs, ensuring they receive tailored care in a safe environment. Learn More Residential Care Our dedicated team offers a warm and inviting atmosphere for residents, fostering comfort and security while promoting independence. Find Out Cleaners Our cleaning staff are fully trained in health and social care cleaning procedures, ensuring your care environment stays hygienic, safe, and compliant.
Get Support Emergency Staffing We offer prompt emergency staffing solutions to ensure that your care services are always adequately supported.

Are staff from your Care Staffing Agency in London fully vetted?

What facilities does your Care Staffing Agency in London work with? Our Care Staffing Agency in London partners with a wide range of providers, including: Residential and nursing care homes Supported living services Domiciliary and private clients NHS hospitals and clinics Rehabilitation and respite care units 6.
Can your Care Staffing Agency in London provide permanent as well as temporary staff?

Our Care Staffing Agency in London supplies both temporary shift cover and long-term recruitment solutions. Whether you need urgent cover for today or a permanent care assistant, we tailor our placements to your organisation’s needs.
This wide coverage ensures rapid deployment of staff wherever your service is located.
Contact us today and discover the Vigil Care Staffing difference! 020 3973 8887 staffing@vigilcarestaffing.
